# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

// Simple PHP Page Router
// Routes requests based on $_GET['page'] parameter to templates in the templates/ directory

// Define the base templates directory
define('TEMPLATES_DIR', __DIR__ . '/templates');

// Define allowed pages (whitelist for security)
$allowed_pages = [
    'home',
    'about',
    'contact',
    'services',
    'blog',
    'portfolio',
    'faq',
    'privacy',
    'terms',
];

// Default page if none specified
$default_page = 'home';

// 404 page
$not_found_page = '404';

/**
 * Sanitize the page parameter to prevent directory traversal and other attacks
 *
 * @param string $page
 * @return string
 */
function sanitize_page_param(string $page): string
{
    // Remove any directory traversal attempts
    $page = str_replace(['..', '/', '\\', "\0"], '', $page);

    // Allow only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores
    $page = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', $page);

    // Convert to lowercase for consistency
    $page = strtolower(trim($page));

    return $page;
}

/**
 * Resolve the template file path for a given page
 *
 * @param string $page
 * @return string|false  Returns the full path or false if not found
 */
function resolve_template(string $page)
{
    $template_path = TEMPLATES_DIR . '/' . $page . '.php';

    if (file_exists($template_path) && is_readable($template_path)) {
        // Ensure the resolved real path is within the templates directory (extra safety)
        $real_path = realpath($template_path);
        $real_templates_dir = realpath(TEMPLATES_DIR);

        if ($real_path && $real_templates_dir && strpos($real_path, $real_templates_dir) === 0) {
            return $real_path;
        }
    }

    return false;
}

// Get the requested page from URL parameter
$requested_page = isset($_GET['page']) ? $_GET['page'] : $default_page;

// Sanitize the input
$page = sanitize_page_param($requested_page);

// Use default page if empty after sanitization
if (empty($page)) {
    $page = $default_page;
}

// Check if the page is in the allowed list
if (!in_array($page, $allowed_pages, true)) {
    // Page not in whitelist — show 404
    http_response_code(404);
    $template = resolve_template($not_found_page);
    if ($template) {
        include $template;
    } else {
        echo '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>404 Not Found</title></head><body>';
        echo '<h1>404 - Page Not Found</h1>';
        echo '<p>The page you requested does not exist.</p>';
        echo '<a href="?page=home">Go to Home</a>';
        echo '</body></html>';
    }
    exit;
}

// Resolve the template file
$template = resolve_template($page);

if ($template === false) {
    // Template file doesn't exist on disk even though it's in the allowed list
    http_response_code(404);
    $fallback = resolve_template($not_found_page);
    if ($fallback) {
        include $fallback;
    } else {
        echo '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>404 Not Found</title></head><body>';
        echo '<h1>404 - Page Not Found</h1>';
        echo '<p>The requested template could not be loaded.</p>';
        echo '<a href="?page=home">Go to Home</a>';
        echo '</body></html>';
    }
    exit;
}

// Set the current page variable for use in templates (e.g., active nav highlighting)
$current_page = $page;

// Include header if it exists
$header_template = resolve_template('partials/header');
if ($header_template) {
    include $header_template;
}

// Include the main page template
include $template;

// Include footer if it exists
$footer_template = resolve_template('partials/footer');
if ($footer_template) {
    include $footer_template;
}
